item.title: I am now self sufficient <3
item.description: edit: and yes the little book that puts food in my cat's belly is also still available at http://catliterature.com
item.dc:creator: LilaJo1987

item.title: If you make a nostril sound you have to hit the green arrow thingy meme dump
item.description:
1. Side note - Aubrey and Conan are a great combo. Go watch every their interaction on YouTube. Also Conan is just the best
2
3. Seriously, why they don't give a single Kindle or something like that?
4. You will never guess her method
5. Old but gold, I like how he smocked her
6
7. Keanu is the GOAT
8. I CAN NOT STRESS THIS ENOUGH
9. For some reason this is my fave meme out of this dump, makes me laugh so much
10. About twice a week
11
12. Yes, students can be intelligent too, who knew?
13
14
15. P.S. In my free time, I'm also working on my passion project. This is pretty much how my day goes... It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired game called "Do Not Press The Button" and if you like the humor of this dump, you might like the game. If you like it, please wishlists to encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Have a happy Friday, my dudes!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: The price of beer at sporting events is do damn high

item.title: Eldritch Horror only 93M miles from Earth!
item.description: MV Edit - this is getting A LOT more attention than I thought it would. Taking this moment to give a shout-out to the new free audio short I released last week. You weirdos will enjoy this twist on the classic 'end of the world short story': https://youtu.be/NBiW2Up1qtY
item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: Tumblr tings
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: Forty Seven A+ Military Grade Memes
item.description:
A nurse once told me my annual MH questionnaire was 'not ideal'.
Who wants to go on a motorbike riders course?
Raise problems... Now they're yours.
One kid used to bury cigarette money in the dirt outside.
Words lose their meaning.
Next stop Russia. Share prices are down.
One... One... Fuck. Again!
It became a game of what you could get away with. I wore someone else's uniform.
Could make good money taking someone's Christmas duty.
Human interaction. I love you.
6K before breakfast.
The trick is to never break eye contact.
Or sort leaves by color.
You can get good at your job, or you can be promoted. You can only pick one.
I still have the necklace somewhere.
Those that call for war never go to war.
Just building a credit score.
Level C
item.dc:creator: lamecanique

item.title: Random dump of stolen memes to aid in serotonin release #11
item.dc:creator: adultswim82

item.title: Why are there so many empty lots in cities?
item.description: tl;dr Empty lots aren't taxed much and increase in value without the owners doing anything. There's a tax specifically designed to combat this called a Land Value Tax. I volunteer with More Neighbours Toronto and More Homes Canada. This is my first attempt at an informative short video. I wrote the script and edited it using Descript. Another volunteer graciously did the filming. I'm currently trying to film the next video about how North America's staircase requirements make housing harder to build without making it less safe.
item.dc:creator: Seanny123
